candidate.objective: An experienced Poly Welder and pipeline construction specialist with a strong background in PE pipe fusion and butt welding, civil earthworks, and drainage operations. Daniel has progressed through drain-laying apprenticeship to leading-hand roles, working across major civil contractors including Downer, Menzies Group, and ACM Resources, with induction approvals for Rio Tinto and Fortescue.

duties: Constructed new polyethylene pipeline systems across mining and civil sites.
Performed maintenance on existing pipelines, including fault identification and rectification.
Carried out poly welding and extrusion welding to applicable standards.
Installed valves and associated pipeline fittings.
Installed monitoring equipment along pipeline corridors.
Planned and scheduled pipeline construction works in coordination with site supervision.
Completed civil works associated with pipeline construction, including trenching and backfilling.
Acted as leading hand on drainage projects from commencement through to completion.
Operated directional drills to install water pipes, power ducts, and sewer pipes on grade using Vermeer 22x20 and 36x50 units.
Laid and installed sewer, stormwater, and water mains to specification.
Read and interpreted site and services plans to guide installation activities.
Set laser levels and conducted site set-outs for accurate grade control.
Performed PE pipe fusion welding and butt welding.
Implemented and maintained traffic management systems (STMS) and ensured a safe worksite.
Operated excavators, front-end loaders, and trucks as required.
Worked as a Lift Operator at Silver Star Mountain Resort, Vernon, BC.
Served as a Canoe Attendant at Moraine Lake Lodge, Alberta.
Performed caretaker duties at Post Hotel, Lake Louise, Alberta.
All positions were based in workers' accommodation in remote environments.
Laid and assisted in the installation of sewer and water pipelines.
Performed PE pipe fusion welding and butt welding to project specifications.
Operated trucks, excavators, and front-end loaders.
Undertook manual labouring duties including locating underground services and seal preparation.
Completed a drain-laying apprenticeship and achieved trade qualification.
Operated trucks and earthmoving equipment across drainage and civil projects.
Laid and assisted in the installation of sewer and water pipelines.
Performed PE pipe fusion welding.
Read construction plans and assisted with site set-out activities.

skills.detail: Proficient in PE pipe fusion welding, butt welding, and extrusion welding for new construction and maintenance applications on mining and civil pipelines.
Experienced in the full pipeline construction cycle from trench excavation and bedding through to installation, welding, and commissioning.
Competent operator of excavators, front-end loaders, directional drills (Vermeer 22x20 and 36x50), and trucks. Holds an HR Drivers Licence.
Experienced in civil earthworks associated with pipeline and drainage construction, including service locating, set-out, and seal preparation.
Familiar with confined space entry procedures, atmospheric gas testing, working at heights, and chainsaw operation. Holds a White Card and is inducted at Rio Tinto and Fortescue operations.

certifications.details: Polyethylene pipe welding competency for fusion and butt welding applications.
Extrusion welding competency for PE pipe systems.

certifications.ticket: Join Polyethylene Plastic Pipelines Using Butt Welding
certifications.details: Nationally recognised unit of competency for butt welding of polyethylene plastic pipelines.

certifications.ticket: Join Polyethylene Plastic Pipelines Using Electrofusion Welding
certifications.details: Nationally recognised unit of competency for electrofusion welding of polyethylene plastic pipelines.
Certified for work at heights including harness use and anchor point inspection.
Certified for confined space entry procedures.
Competency in atmospheric gas testing for confined space and hazardous area entry.
Competent in chainsaw operation for vegetation management on construction sites.
Certified for operation of four-wheel drive vehicles in remote and off-road environments.
Construction industry general induction (White Card — Work Safely in the Construction Industry).
Western Australian Heavy Rigid (HR) class motor vehicle drivers licence.
Approved site induction for Rio Tinto operations.
Approved site induction for Fortescue operations.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
